policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-14 - Deny weak TLS Cipher Suites in App Service'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-14 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site Deny lower TLS Cipher Suite versions
policyDefinition.description: This policy requires App Service site slots to use a recent TLS Cipher Suite version. The recommended minimal cipher suite of the Nationaal Cyber Security Centrum are rquired for App Service Environment to function correctly.

drcp.name: AppServiceSiteSlotMinimumTlsCipherSuite
drcp.controlDesc: Deny weak TLS Cipher Suites in App Service

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - AuditIfNotExists or Disabled.
The allowed minimale TLS Cipher Suite.
